name: proofkit
description: Proofkit — a self-contained, toggleable, portable content-review tool: an on-page click-to-comment overlay + admin dashboard + Cloudflare Worker, injectable into any Astro / Claude Code website project.

hostSeams: one gated line in the shared layout (renders <ProofkitOverlay /> when PROOFKIT_ENABLED)
PUBLIC_REVIEW_WORKER_URL build env (CI) — optional, enables shared store
hostRequirements: Astro (static or hybrid) with a shared layout that accepts an `seo` prop + default <slot/>
an SEO type at src/lib/seo (adjust the import in config.ts if elsewhere)
Cloudflare account for the Worker (optional; runs in localStorage demo mode without it)
